'''New Horizons Development Corporation''' was a company that specialized in [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] production. The company employed several [[Fefze]] swarms to make food production more efficient.<ref name="GG4-2" /> It was owned by a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], when it sought to purchase sharecropping lands from a collective of small farm-owners, and the farmers were convinced to give up their lands in exchange for jobs working for New Horizons.<ref name="TOR" />
